title: MinecraftTop4ik's Uncraftable Things
description: This mod adds a crafts to uncraftable things
body:
This mod adds a crafts to uncraftable things. You can craft a Bedrock, Chainmail stuff and etc

You can craft a all uncraftable things in the game. But in this version of mod, contains a few crafts to things

I'm will be update this mod, and update with new secret and uncraftable items
